IonQ.rationale: Nudged growth down slightly to align with fresh 43.9% YoY, near current forward trajectory.

CoreWeave.rationale: unchanged: no YoY provided; $6bn TTM consistent with sustained hyperscale-driven growth.

Palantir.rationale: unchanged: 16.7% reported TTM YoY but recent quarterly accel supports maintained ~40% forward outlook.

Lumentum.rationale: unchanged: 18.2% YoY consistent with datacom ramp supporting forward acceleration.

Micron.rationale: Raised AI segment rev slightly and earn_quality on strong 55% YoY HBM-driven upcycle.

AMD.rationale: unchanged: 8.1% total YoY masks strong MI300 AI ramp; forward outlook intact.

NVIDIA.rationale: unchanged: fresh metrics consistent with dominant AI datacenter position.

AppLovin.rationale: unchanged: 6.2% TTM YoY lags but AI ad-engine momentum supports outlook.

Vertiv.rationale: unchanged: 6% TTM YoY trailing but datacenter cooling/power backlog supports forward growth.

Coherent.rationale: unchanged: 4.9% YoY, forward datacom optics recovery supports outlook.

Meta.rationale: unchanged: 6.1% TTM YoY but AI-driven ad and infra outlook supports maintained value.

Oracle.rationale: Nudged up slightly on accelerating OCI/cloud AI backlog momentum.

Microsoft.rationale: unchanged: 4.2% TTM YoY but Azure AI segment growth supports outlook.

Texas Instruments.rationale: unchanged: 6.1% YoY recovery consistent with maintained cyclical outlook.

Amazon.rationale: unchanged: AWS AI acceleration supports outlook despite low total YoY.

Alphabet.rationale: unchanged: 4.5% total YoY but cloud AI growth supports maintained outlook.

Qualcomm.rationale: unchanged: flat/-0.8% YoY confirms soft handset demand; outlook intact.

Apple.rationale: unchanged: 3.6% YoY consistent with mature growth profile.

Cisco.rationale: unchanged: 2.4% YoY consistent with maintained outlook.

IBM.rationale: unchanged: 1.5% YoY consistent with low-growth profile.
